title: sorbus keissleri
intro: Sorbus keissleri, also known as the Korean mountain ash, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Sorbus keissleri include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
